docs.title: Download Styles
docs.text:
littledl supports multiple download styles:

Style Description Best For single Single-threaded download Small files, servers without Range multi Multi-threaded segmented download Large files, stable connections adaptive Automatically select best style Most use cases hybrid_turbo Adaptive chunk sizing with AIMD congestion control Maximum speed on unstable networks

docs.title: Applying Download Style
docs.text:
from littledl import DownloadConfig, DownloadStyle

config = DownloadConfig()
config.apply_style(DownloadStyle.HYBRID_TURBO)

docs.title: Manual Chunk Size
docs.text:
Override automatic chunk sizing for specific use cases:

from littledl import DownloadConfig

config = DownloadConfig(
    enable_chunking=True,
    chunk_size=8 * 1024 * 1024,  # 8MB chunks
    max_chunks=8,
)

docs.title: Disabling Chunking
docs.text:
For small files or specific scenarios:

from littledl import DownloadConfig

config = DownloadConfig(enable_chunking=False)

docs.title: Multiple Simultaneous Downloads
docs.text:
import asyncio
from littledl import download_file

async def download_multiple(urls: list[str]):
    tasks = [download_file(url) for url in urls]
    return await asyncio.gather(*tasks)

paths = asyncio.run(download_multiple([
    "https://example.com/file1.zip",
    "https://example.com/file2.zip",
    "https://example.com/file3.zip",
]))

docs.title: Stream Processing
docs.text:
Download and process content in chunks without saving to disk:

from littledl import download_file_stream

async for chunk in download_file_stream("https://example.com/large_file.zip"):
    process(chunk)

docs.title: Custom Progress Display
docs.text:
from littledl import download_file_sync

class ProgressTracker:
    def __init__(self, total: int):
        self.total = total
        self.downloaded = 0

    def __call__(self, downloaded: int, total: int, speed: float, eta: int):
        self.downloaded = downloaded
        percent = (downloaded / total) * 100
        print(f"\r{percent:.1f}% | {speed/1024:.1f} KB/s | ETA: {eta}s", end="")

tracker = ProgressTracker(total=1000000)
path = download_file_sync(
    "https://example.com/file.zip",
    progress_callback=tracker,
)

docs.title: Chunk Status Tracking
docs.text:
from littledl import ChunkEvent, download_file_sync

def on_chunk(event: ChunkEvent):
    print(
        f"chunk={event.chunk_index} status={event.status} "
        f"progress={event.progress:.1f}%"
    )

path = download_file_sync(
    "https://example.com/file.zip",
    chunk_callback=on_chunk,
)

docs.title: download_file_sync
docs.text:
Synchronous file download.

from littledl import download_file_sync

path = download_file_sync(
    url: str,
    save_path: str = ".",
    filename: str | None = None,
    config: DownloadConfig | None = None,
    progress_callback: Callable | None = None,
    chunk_callback: Callable | None = None,

docs.title: Methods
docs.text:
apply_style(style: Any) -> "DownloadConfig"

Quickly reconfigures all internal scheduling variables, chunking thresholds, and AIMD congestion control parameters based on a provided style. Supports either a DownloadStyle enum or a standard string style name (e.g., "SINGLE", "MULTI", "ADAPTIVE", or "HYBRID_TURBO"). Returns the modified DownloadConfig instance.

docs.title: BufferedFileWriter
docs.text:
High-performance buffered file writer for optimized concurrent download performance.

from littledl import BufferedFileWriter

writer = BufferedFileWriter(
    file_path="/path/to/file.zip",
    mode="wb",
    buffer_size=512 * 1024,  # 512KB buffer
    flush_interval=0.5,      # 500ms auto flush
    max_buffers=16,          # Maximum concurrent buffers
)

await writer.open()
await writer.write_at(offset=0, data=b"chunk data")
await writer.close()

docs.title: DirectFileWriter
docs.text:
Direct file writer (traditional implementation, kept for backward compatibility).

from littledl import DirectFileWriter

writer = DirectFileWriter(file_path="/path/to/file.zip")
await writer.open()
await writer.write_at(offset=0, data=b"chunk data")
await writer.close()

Note: BufferedFileWriter is automatically used in chunked downloads, no manual configuration needed.

docs.title: Batch Download
docs.text: littledl supports multi-file batch downloading with specialized optimizations for large numbers of small/large files or mixed scenarios.

docs.title: Core Features
docs.text:
• Adaptive Concurrency: Dynamically adjusts concurrent downloads based on network conditions
  • Small File Priority: Automatically identifies and prioritizes small files for better UX
  • Connection Pooling: All files share a connection pool to reduce connection overhead
  • Batch Probe: Parallel HEAD requests to fetch file information
  • Smart Chunking: Automatically selects optimal chunk strategy based on file size

docs.title: Synchronous Batch Download
docs.text:
from littledl import batch_download_sync

results = batch_download_sync(
    urls=[
        "https://example.com/file1.zip",
        "https://example.com/file2.zip",
        "https://example.com/file3.zip",
    ],
    save_path="./downloads",
    max_concurrent_files=5,
)

for url, path, error in results:
    if path:
        print(f"✓ {url} -> {path}")
    else:
        print(f"✗ {url}: {error}")

docs.title: Async Batch Download
docs.text:
import asyncio
from littledl import BatchDownloader

async def main():
    downloader = BatchDownloader(
        max_concurrent_files=5,
        max_concurrent_chunks_per_file=4,
        enable_adaptive_concurrency=True,
    )

    await downloader.add_urls([
        "https://example.com/file1.zip",
        "https://example.com/file2.zip",
    ], "./downloads")

    await downloader.start()

asyncio.run(main())

docs.title: Batch Progress Callback
docs.text:
The callback system has been fully upgraded to support multiple invocation styles (event, dict, kwargs, legacy) with detailed per-file progress information.

import asyncio
from littledl import BatchDownloader, BatchProgress

# Style 1: Receive BatchProgress object (recommended)
def on_batch_progress(progress: BatchProgress):
    print(f"Batch Progress: {progress.completed_files}/{progress.total_files}")
    print(f"Speed: {progress.smooth_speed/1024/1024:.1f} MB/s")
    print(f"ETA: {progress.eta:.0f}s")
    print(f"Speed Stability: {progress.speed_stability:.2f}")
    # View downloading files
    for f in progress.get_active_files():
        print(f"  Downloading: {f.filename} - {f.progress:.1f}%")

# Style 2: Receive dict
def on_batch_progress_dict(data: dict):
    print(f"Batch Progress: {data['completed_files']}/{data['total_files']}")
    print(f"Speed: {data['smooth_speed']/1024/1024:.1f} MB/s")
    print(f"File Progress: {data['files_progress']:.1f}%")

# Style 3: Receive kwargs
def on_batch_progress_kwargs(total_files=0, completed_files=0, smooth_speed=0, files_progress=0, **kwargs):
    print(f"Batch Progress: {completed_files}/{total_files}")
    print(f"File Progress: {files_progress:.1f}%")

# Style 4: Legacy format (auto-detected)
def on_batch_progress_legacy(completed: int, total: int, speed: float, eta: int, stability: float):
    print(f"Batch Progress: {completed}/{total}")

downloader = BatchDownloader()
downloader.set_progress_callback(on_batch_progress)  # Auto-detects style

docs.title: File Complete Callback
docs.text:
from littledl import FileTask

def on_file_complete(task: FileTask):
    print(f"File Complete: {task.filename} ({task.file_size} bytes)")

downloader = BatchDownloader()
downloader.set_file_complete_callback(on_file_complete)

docs.title: Adaptive Concurrency Control
docs.text:
Adaptive concurrency is enabled by default. The system automatically adjusts concurrency based on download speed:

  • Speed continuously decreasing → Increase concurrency to utilize more bandwidth
  • Speed stable or increasing → Maintain or increase concurrency
  • Error rate rising → Automatically reduce concurrency
downloader = BatchDownloader(
    enable_adaptive_concurrency=True,
    max_concurrent_files=10,
)

docs.title: Manual Concurrency Control
docs.text:
Disable adaptive mode and manually set a fixed concurrency:

downloader = BatchDownloader(
    enable_adaptive_concurrency=False,
    max_concurrent_files=3,
)

docs.title: File Priority
docs.text:
Support manual file download priority setting:

downloader = BatchDownloader()

await downloader.add_url(url1, priority=0)  # High priority
await downloader.add_url(url2, priority=1)  # Normal priority
await downloader.add_url(url3, priority=2)  # Low priority

docs.title: Smart Chunking Strategy
docs.text:
The system automatically selects the optimal chunking strategy based on file size:

File Size Chunk Strategy Description < 5 MB Single chunk Avoid chunking overhead 5 MB ~ 100 MB 4 chunks Balance concurrency and overhead > 100 MB 8 chunks Maximize throughput

docs.title: Get All Tasks
docs.text:
downloader = BatchDownloader()
await downloader.add_urls(urls, "./downloads")
await downloader.start()

tasks = downloader.get_all_tasks()
for task in tasks:
    print(f"{task.filename}: {task.status.value} ({task.progress:.1f}%)")

docs.title: Get Statistics
docs.text:
stats = downloader.get_stats()
print(f"Total files: {stats['total_files']}")
print(f"Completed: {stats['completed_files']}")
print(f"Failed: {stats['failed_files']}")
print(f"Current concurrency: {stats['current_concurrency']}")
print(f"Total progress: {stats['progress_percent']:.1f}%")

docs.title: Get Batch Progress
docs.text:
progress = downloader.get_progress()
print(f"Total size: {progress.total_bytes / 1024 / 1024:.1f} MB")
print(f"Downloaded: {progress.downloaded_bytes / 1024 / 1024:.1f} MB")
print(f"Speed: {progress.overall_speed / 1024 / 1024:.1f} MB/s")
print(f"ETA: {progress.eta:.0f}s")

docs.title: Pause, Resume and Cancel
docs.text:
downloader = BatchDownloader()
await downloader.add_urls(urls, "./downloads")

task = asyncio.create_task(downloader.start())

await asyncio.sleep(5)
await downloader.pause()

await asyncio.sleep(2)
await downloader.resume()

await asyncio.sleep(5)
await downloader.cancel()

await task

docs.title: BatchDownloader
docs.text:
class BatchDownloader:
    def __init__(
        self,
        config: DownloadConfig | None = None,
        max_concurrent_files: int = 5,
        max_concurrent_chunks_per_file: int = 4,
        enable_adaptive_concurrency: bool = True,
        enable_small_file_priority: bool = True,
    ) -> None:
        ...

    async def add_url(
        self,
        url: str,
        save_path: str | Path = "./downloads",
        filename: str | None = None,
        priority: int = 0,
    ) -> str:
        """Add a single URL to the download queue"""
        ...

    async def add_urls(
        self,
        urls: list[str],
        save_path: str | Path = "./downloads",
    ) -> list[str]:
        """Batch add URLs to the download queue"""
        ...

    def set_progress_callback(self, callback) -> None:
        """Set batch progress callback (completed, total, speed, eta)"""
        ...

    def set_file_complete_callback(self, callback) -> None:
        """Set file complete callback (task: FileTask)"""
        ...

    async def start(self) -> None:
        """Start batch download"""
        ...

    async def pause(self) -> None:
        """Pause download"""
        ...

    async def resume(self) -> None:
        """Resume download"""
        ...

    async def cancel(self) -> None:
        """Cancel download"""
        ...

    async def stop(self) -> None:
        """Stop download and close connection pool"""
        ...

    def get_task(self, task_id: str) -> FileTask | None:
        """Get task by ID"""
        ...

    def get_all_tasks(self) -> list[FileTask]:
        """Get all tasks"""
        ...

    def get_progress(self) -> BatchProgress:
        """Get batch download progress"""
        ...

    def get_stats(self) -> dict:
        """Get statistics"""
        ...

docs.title: High-Speed Download Mode (EnhancedBatchDownloader)
docs.text: EnhancedBatchDownloader is a high-performance batch downloader optimized with aria2-style features, providing smarter download scheduling.

docs.title: Core Features
docs.text: Feature Description Intelligent Style Selection Automatically select optimal download style based on file size, server support, and network conditions Dynamic Thread Allocation Global thread pool unified scheduling to avoid resource waste Multi-source Backup Support for multiple backup URLs with automatic failover File Reuse Content-aware matching to avoid duplicate downloads

docs.title: Style Selection Algorithm
docs.text:
The system automatically analyzes and selects the best download style:

from littledl import DownloadStyle, StrategySelector

selector = StrategySelector(
    default_style=DownloadStyle.ADAPTIVE,
    enable_single=True,
    enable_multi=True,
)

profile = selector.analyze_file(
    url="https://example.com/file.zip",
    size=100 * 1024 * 1024,
    supports_range=True,
)

decision = selector.select_style(profile)
print(f"Recommended style: {decision.style.value}")
print(f"Recommended chunks: {decision.recommended_chunks}")
print(f"Estimated speedup: {decision.estimated_speedup:.1f}x")

docs.title: Usage Example
docs.text:
import asyncio
from littledl import EnhancedBatchDownloader

async def main():
    downloader = EnhancedBatchDownloader(
        max_concurrent_files=5,
        max_total_threads=15,
        enable_existing_file_reuse=True,
        enable_multi_source=True,
    )

    await downloader.add_url(
        "https://example.com/file.zip",
        backup_urls=["https://backup.com/file.zip"]
    )

    await downloader.start()

asyncio.run(main())

docs.title: Dynamic Style Allocation
docs.text:
When downloading multiple files, the system dynamically allocates styles based on global resources:

from littledl import DynamicStyleAllocator, DownloadStyle

allocator = DynamicStyleAllocator(
    selector=selector,
    max_concurrent_files=5,
    max_total_chunks=16,
)

decision = await allocator.add_file(
    file_id="file1",
    url="https://example.com/file.zip",
    size=100 * 1024 * 1024,
    supports_range=True,
    priority=1,
)
print(f"Allocated style: {decision.style.value}")

docs.title: File Reuse Statistics
docs.text:
reuse_stats = downloader.get_file_reuse_stats()
print(f"Checks: {reuse_stats['checks']}")
print(f"Hits: {reuse_stats['hits']}")
print(f"Bytes saved: {reuse_stats['bytes_saved_formatted']}")

docs.title: API Reference
docs.text:
from littledl import (
    EnhancedBatchDownloader,
    StrategySelector,
    DynamicStyleAllocator,
    DownloadStyle,
)

selector = StrategySelector(
    default_style=DownloadStyle.ADAPTIVE,
    enable_single=True,
    enable_multi=True,
    max_chunks=16,
)

allocator = DynamicStyleAllocator(
    selector=selector,
    max_concurrent_files=5,
    max_total_chunks=16,
)

downloader = EnhancedBatchDownloader(
    config: DownloadConfig | None = None,
    max_concurrent_files: int = 5,
    max_total_threads: int = 15,
    small_file_threshold: int = 1 * 1024 * 1024,
    enable_existing_file_reuse: bool = True,
    enable_multi_source: bool = True,
    enable_adaptive_speed: bool = True,
)

docs.title: Command Line Interface
docs.text: littledl provides a full-featured command-line interface for both interactive use and scripting.

docs.title: Installation
docs.text:
After installing littledl, the CLI is available as the littledl command:

pip install littledl

Verify installation:

littledl --version
# Output: littledl 0.6.1

docs.title: Download a Single File
docs.text: littledl "https://example.com/large-file.zip" -o ./downloads

docs.title: Download Multiple Files Directly
docs.text: littledl "https://example.com/file1.zip" "https://example.com/file2.pdf" "https://example.com/file3.doc" -o ./downloads

docs.title: Batch Download
docs.text:
Create a file urls.txt with one URL per line:

# Comments are supported
https://example.com/file1.zip
https://example.com/file2.pdf
https://example.com/file3.doc

Then download:

littledl -F urls.txt -o ./downloads

docs.title: Common Options
docs.text: Option Description Default -o, --output PATH Output directory or file path ./downloads -f, --filename NAME Specify output filename Server-provided -c, --max-chunks N Maximum parallel chunks 16 -t, --timeout SECONDS Request timeout 300 --proxy URL HTTP proxy None --speed-limit BYTES/s Limit download speed Unlimited --retry N Maximum retry attempts 3 -v, --verbose Verbose output False --temp-dir PATH Temporary files directory Same as output

docs.title: Download Styles
docs.text: Style Description Best For single Single-threaded download Small files, servers without Range support multi Multi-threaded segmented Large files, stable connections adaptive Auto-select based on conditions Most use cases hybrid_turbo Adaptive with AIMD control Maximum speed, unstable networks auto Let littledl analyze and decide Recommended for beginners

docs.title: Examples
docs.text:
# Auto-select best style
littledl "https://example.com/file.zip" -s auto

# Force single-threaded
littledl "https://example.com/file.zip" -s single

# Maximum performance
littledl "https://example.com/file.zip" -s hybrid_turbo -c 32

docs.title: Interactive Mode (TTY)
docs.text:
When stdout is a terminal, littledl displays an animated progress bar:

[=============>                ]  45.2% |  45.2MB / 100.0MB | 10.5MB/s | ETA: 00:05

docs.title: Non-Interactive Mode (Pipe/Redirect)
docs.text:
When output is piped or redirected, littledl automatically switches to minimal output:

# Piped to file
littledl "https://example.com/file.zip" > download.log

# Piped to another tool
littledl "https://example.com/file.zip" | head -c 100

docs.title: Output Formats
docs.text:
Use --output-format to control output style:

Format Description auto Automatic (default) - TTY uses text, pipe uses JSON text Human-readable text output json Structured JSON for scripting

docs.title: JSON Output
docs.text:
For programmatic use, specify JSON output:

littledl "https://example.com/file.zip" -o /tmp --output-format json

JSON output example:

{
  "type": "download",
  "success": true,
  "path": "/tmp/file.zip",
  "size": 104857600
}

Batch download JSON output:

{
  "type": "batch",
  "success": true,
  "total": 10,
  "completed": 9,
  "failed": 1,
  "total_bytes": 104857600,
  "elapsed_seconds": 120.5,
  "average_speed": 870123.45,
  "tasks": [
    {
      "filename": "file1.zip",
      "url": "https://example.com/file1.zip",
      "status": "completed",
      "size": 10485760,
      "downloaded": 10485760,
      "error": null
    }
  ]
}

docs.title: Exit Codes
docs.text:
littledl uses specific exit codes for scripting:

Code Meaning 0 Success 1 General error 2 URL error or invalid argument 3 Download failed after retries 4 Cancelled by user (Ctrl+C)

Example in scripts:

littledl "https://example.com/file.zip" -o /tmp
if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then
    echo "Download successful"
else
    echo "Download failed with code $?"
fi

docs.title: Resume Interrupted Download
docs.text: littledl "https://example.com/large-file.zip" -o ./downloads --resume

docs.title: Skip SSL Verification (Not Recommended)
docs.text: littledl "https://example.com/file.zip" --no-verify-ssl

docs.title: Use Proxy
docs.text: littledl "https://example.com/file.zip" --proxy "http://proxy:8080"

docs.title: Limit Speed
docs.text:
# Limit to 1MB/s
littledl "https://example.com/file.zip" --speed-limit 1048576

docs.title: Batch Download with Concurrent Limit
docs.text: littledl -F urls.txt -o ./downloads --max-concurrent 3

docs.title: Quiet Mode (Minimal Output)
docs.text: littledl -F urls.txt --quiet

docs.title: Show File Info Without Downloading
docs.text:
littledl "https://example.com/file.zip" -i
# Output:
# File Info:
#   Filename: example.zip
#   Size: 104.5 MB
#   Content-Type: application/zip
#   Resume Support: Yes

docs.text: littledl "https://example.com/file.zip" -s auto -i

docs.title: Configuration Guide
docs.text: Detailed configuration options for littledl.

docs.title: DownloadConfig
docs.text:
Main configuration class for download operations.

from littledl import DownloadConfig

config = DownloadConfig(
    enable_chunking=True,
    max_chunks=16,
    chunk_size=4 * 1024 * 1024,  # 4MB
    buffer_size=64 * 1024,        # 64KB
    timeout=300,
    resume=True,
    verify_ssl=True,
)

docs.title: Configuration Options
docs.text: Option Type Default Description enable_chunking bool True Enable multi-threaded chunked download max_chunks int 16 Maximum number of concurrent chunks chunk_size int 4MB Default size for each chunk buffer_size int 64KB Disk write buffer size timeout float 300 Read/write timeout in seconds resume bool True Enable resume support verify_ssl bool True Verify SSL certificates fallback_to_single_on_failure bool True Auto fallback to single-stream mode on chunked failure enable_adaptive bool True Enable adaptive network scheduling enable_hybrid_turbo bool True Enable hybrid turbo download with AIMD congestion control and smart chunk fallback hybrid_aimd_increase_step int 1 Target worker increase step size (Additive Increase) hybrid_aimd_decrease_factor float 0.5 Factor used to multiply target workers on speed decline (Multiplicative Decrease) hybrid_speedup_threshold float 0.08 Minimum relative speedup threshold required to trigger AIMD hybrid_slow_chunk_ratio float 0.45 Threshold ratio defining extremely slow chunks verify_hash bool False Verify downloaded file hash expected_hash str None Expected hash value hash_algorithm str sha256 Hash algorithm used in verification min_file_size int None Reject files smaller than this size max_file_size int None Reject files larger than this size progress_update_interval float 0.5 Progress callback interval in seconds chunk_callback Callable None Per-chunk status callback during chunked download

docs.title: Proxy Configuration
docs.text:
from littledl import DownloadConfig, ProxyConfig, ProxyMode

proxy = ProxyConfig(
    mode=ProxyMode.CUSTOM,
    http_proxy="http://proxy.example.com:8080",
    https_proxy="https://proxy.example.com:8080",
)

config = DownloadConfig(proxy=proxy)

docs.title: Speed Limiting
docs.text:
from littledl import DownloadConfig, SpeedLimitConfig, SpeedLimitMode

speed_limit = SpeedLimitConfig(
    enabled=True,
    mode=SpeedLimitMode.GLOBAL,
    max_speed=1024 * 1024,  # 1 MB/s
)

config = DownloadConfig(speed_limit=speed_limit)

docs.title: Progress Callback
docs.text:
progress_callback supports four formats:

  • Legacy positional args: (downloaded, total, speed, eta)
  • Event object: ProgressEvent
  • Dictionary payload: dict
  • Keyword payload: **payload
from littledl import ProgressEvent

def on_progress(downloaded: int, total: int, speed: float, eta: int):
    percent = (downloaded / total) * 100
    print(f"\r{percent:.1f}% | {speed/1024:.1f} KB/s | ETA: {eta}s", end="")

def on_event(event: ProgressEvent):
    print(event.progress, event.remaining)

def on_dict(payload: dict):
    print(payload["downloaded"], payload["speed"])

def on_kwargs(**payload):
    print(payload["eta"])

config = DownloadConfig(progress_callback=on_progress)

docs.title: Chunk Status Callback
docs.text:
chunk_callback is only triggered in chunked mode. It supports the same four callback formats.

from littledl import ChunkEvent

def on_chunk(event: ChunkEvent):
    print(event.chunk_index, event.status, event.progress)

config = DownloadConfig(chunk_callback=on_chunk)

docs.title: Error Handling
docs.text: How littledl handles errors and exceptions.

docs.title: DownloadException
docs.text:
Base exception for all download-related errors.

from littledl import DownloadException

try:
    path = download_file_sync("https://example.com/file.zip")
except DownloadException as e:
    print(f"Download failed: {e}")

docs.title: NetworkError
docs.text:
Network-related errors (connection timeout, DNS failure, etc.).

from littledl import NetworkError

try:
    path = download_file_sync("https://example.com/file.zip")
except NetworkError as e:
    print(f"Network error: {e}")

docs.title: AuthenticationError
docs.text:
Authentication failures.

from littledl import AuthenticationError

try:
    path = download_file_sync("https://example.com/protected.zip", config=config)
except AuthenticationError as e:
    print(f"Auth failed: {e}")

docs.title: FileExistsError
docs.text:
File already exists and overwrite is set to False.

from littledl import FileExistsError

try:
    path = download_file_sync("https://example.com/file.zip", overwrite=False)
except FileExistsError as e:
    print(f"File exists: {e}")

docs.title: Retry Configuration
docs.text:
Configure automatic retries for failed downloads.

from littledl import DownloadConfig, RetryConfig, RetryMode

retry = RetryConfig(
    enabled=True,
    mode=RetryMode.EXPONENTIAL,
    max_retries=3,
    initial_delay=1.0,
    max_delay=60.0,
)

config = DownloadConfig(retry=retry)

docs.title: URL Validation
docs.text:
Always validate URLs before downloading:

from urllib.parse import urlparse

def validate_url(url: str) -> bool:
    parsed = urlparse(url)
    return parsed.scheme in ('http', 'https')

if not validate_url(url):
    raise ValueError("Invalid URL")

docs.title: File Size Limits
docs.text:
Set maximum file size to prevent excessive downloads:

from littledl import DownloadConfig

config = DownloadConfig(
    max_file_size=100 * 1024 * 1024,  # 100MB
)

docs.text: pip install littledl

from littledl import download_file_sync

path = download_file_sync("https://example.com/file.zip")

docs.title: Asynchronous Download
docs.text:
import asyncio
from littledl import download_file

async def main():
    path = await download_file(
        "https://example.com/file.zip",
        save_path="./downloads",
        filename="my_file.zip",
    )
    print(f"Downloaded to: {path}")

asyncio.run(main())

Automatically detect and use system proxy settings.

Manually specify proxy settings.

from littledl import DownloadConfig, ProxyConfig, ProxyMode

docs.title: 高级用法
docs.text: littledl 的高级功能和优化。

docs.title: 下载风格
docs.text:
littledl 支持多种下载风格：

风格 说明 适用场景 single 单线程下载 小文件、不支持 Range 的服务器 multi 多线程分段下载 大文件、稳定网络 adaptive 自动选择最优风格 大多数场景 hybrid_turbo 自适应分块 + AIMD 拥塞控制 不稳定网络下追求极限速度

docs.title: 应用下载风格
docs.text:
from littledl import DownloadConfig, DownloadStyle

config = DownloadConfig()
config.apply_style(DownloadStyle.HYBRID_TURBO)

docs.title: 手动分块大小
docs.text:
为特定用例覆盖自动分块大小：

from littledl import DownloadConfig

config = DownloadConfig(
    enable_chunking=True,
    chunk_size=8 * 1024 * 1024,  # 8MB 分块
    max_chunks=8,
)

docs.title: 禁用分块
docs.text:
对于小文件或特定场景：

from littledl import DownloadConfig

config = DownloadConfig(enable_chunking=False)

docs.title: 多个同时下载
docs.text:
import asyncio
from littledl import download_file

async def download_multiple(urls: list[str]):
    tasks = [download_file(url) for url in urls]
    return await asyncio.gather(*tasks)

paths = asyncio.run(download_multiple([
    "https://example.com/file1.zip",
    "https://example.com/file2.zip",
    "https://example.com/file3.zip",
]))

docs.title: 自定义请求头
docs.text:
from littledl import DownloadConfig

config = DownloadConfig(
    headers={
        "User-Agent": "MyApp/1.0",
        "Accept": "application/octet-stream",
    }
)

docs.title: Cookie 处理
docs.text:
from littledl import DownloadConfig

config = DownloadConfig(
    cookies={
        "session_id": "abc123",
    }
)

docs.title: 使用自定义 CA 验证
docs.text:
from littledl import DownloadConfig

config = DownloadConfig(
    verify_ssl=True,
    ssl_cert="/path/to/ca-bundle.crt",
)

docs.title: 禁用 SSL 验证（不推荐）
docs.text:
from littledl import DownloadConfig

config = DownloadConfig(verify_ssl=False)

docs.title: 流式处理
docs.text:
下载并分块处理内容而不保存到磁盘：

from littledl import download_file_stream

async for chunk in download_file_stream("https://example.com/large_file.zip"):
    process(chunk)

docs.title: 自定义进度显示
docs.text:
from littledl import download_file_sync

class ProgressTracker:
    def __init__(self, total: int):
        self.total = total
        self.downloaded = 0

    def __call__(self, downloaded: int, total: int, speed: float, eta: int):
        self.downloaded = downloaded
        percent = (downloaded / total) * 100
        print(f"\r{percent:.1f}% | {speed/1024:.1f} KB/s | 剩余: {eta}s", end="")

tracker = ProgressTracker(total=1000000)
path = download_file_sync(
    "https://example.com/file.zip",
    progress_callback=tracker,
)

docs.title: 分块状态跟踪
docs.text:
from littledl import ChunkEvent, download_file_sync

def on_chunk(event: ChunkEvent):
    print(
        f"chunk={event.chunk_index} status={event.status} "
        f"progress={event.progress:.1f}%"
    )

path = download_file_sync(
    "https://example.com/file.zip",
    chunk_callback=on_chunk,
)

docs.title: 缓冲区大小
docs.text:
为您的存储调整缓冲区大小：

from littledl import DownloadConfig

config = DownloadConfig(
    buffer_size=256 * 1024,  # 256KB 缓冲区
)

docs.title: 连接池
docs.text:
配置连接池设置：

from littledl import DownloadConfig

config = DownloadConfig(
    max_connections=32,
    max_keepalive_connections=16,
)

docs.title: API 参考
docs.text: littledl 的完整 API 参考。

docs.title: download_file_sync
docs.text:
同步文件下载。

from littledl import download_file_sync

path = download_file_sync(
    url: str,
    save_path: str = ".",
    filename: str | None = None,
    config: DownloadConfig | None = None,
    progress_callback: Callable | None = None,
    chunk_callback: Callable | None = None,
) -> Path

docs.title: download_file
docs.text:
异步文件下载。

from littledl import download_file

path = await download_file(
    url: str,
    save_path: str = ".",
    filename: str | None = None,
    config: DownloadConfig | None = None,
    progress_callback: Callable | None = None,
    chunk_callback: Callable | None = None,
) -> Path

docs.title: 方法
docs.text:
apply_style(style: Any) -> "DownloadConfig"

根据相应的下载风格（支持 DownloadStyle 枚举对象，或对应名称的字符串如 "SINGLE", "MULTI", "ADAPTIVE", "HYBRID_TURBO"）一次性更改当前所有相关的调度算法配置、分块开关与 AIMD 网络拥塞控制参数，返回修改后的配置对象自身。

docs.title: ProxyMode
docs.text:
• SYSTEM - 自动检测系统代理
  • CUSTOM - 使用自定义代理设置
  • NONE - 不使用代理

docs.title: SpeedLimitMode
docs.text:
• GLOBAL - 限制整体速度
  • PER_CHUNK - 限制每个分块的速度

docs.title: 多语言支持
docs.text:
from littledl import set_language, get_available_languages

set_language("zh")  # 或 "en"
print(get_available_languages())  # {'en': 'English', 'zh': '中文'}

docs.title: BufferedFileWriter
docs.text:
高性能缓冲文件写入器，用于优化并发下载性能。

from littledl import BufferedFileWriter

writer = BufferedFileWriter(
    file_path="/path/to/file.zip",
    mode="wb",
    buffer_size=512 * 1024,  # 512KB 缓冲
    flush_interval=0.5,      # 500ms 自动刷新
    max_buffers=16,          # 最大并发缓冲数
)

await writer.open()
await writer.write_at(offset=0, data=b"chunk data")
await writer.close()

docs.title: DirectFileWriter
docs.text:
直接文件写入器（传统实现，保留向后兼容）。

from littledl import DirectFileWriter

writer = DirectFileWriter(file_path="/path/to/file.zip")
await writer.open()
await writer.write_at(offset=0, data=b"chunk data")
await writer.close()

注意: BufferedFileWriter 会自动在分块下载中使用，无需手动配置。

docs.title: 认证设置
docs.text: 如何为受保护的资源配置认证。

docs.title: Basic 认证
docs.text:
auth = AuthConfig(
    auth_type=AuthType.BASIC,
    username="user",
    password="pass",
)

docs.title: Digest 认证
docs.text:
auth = AuthConfig(
    auth_type=AuthType.DIGEST,
    username="user",
    password="pass",
)

docs.title: 使用认证
docs.text:
from littledl import DownloadConfig, AuthConfig, AuthType

auth = AuthConfig(
    auth_type=AuthType.BEARER,
    token="your-token",
)

config = DownloadConfig(auth=auth)
path = download_file_sync("https://example.com/protected/file.zip", config=config)

docs.title: 批量下载
docs.text: littledl 支持多文件批量下载，针对大量小文件、大文件或混合场景进行了专门优化。

docs.title: 核心特性
docs.text:
• 自适应并发：根据网络状况动态调整同时下载的文件数
  • 小文件优先：自动识别小文件并优先处理，提升用户体验
  • 连接复用：所有文件共享连接池，减少连接建立开销
  • 批量Probe：并行发送 HEAD 请求获取文件信息
  • 智能分块：根据文件大小自动选择最优分块策略

docs.title: 同步批量下载
docs.text:
from littledl import batch_download_sync

results = batch_download_sync(
    urls=[
        "https://example.com/file1.zip",
        "https://example.com/file2.zip",
        "https://example.com/file3.zip",
    ],
    save_path="./downloads",
    max_concurrent_files=5,
)

for url, path, error in results:
    if path:
        print(f"✓ {url} -> {path}")
    else:
        print(f"✗ {url}: {error}")

docs.title: 异步批量下载
docs.text:
import asyncio
from littledl import BatchDownloader

async def main():
    downloader = BatchDownloader(
        max_concurrent_files=5,
        max_concurrent_chunks_per_file=4,
        enable_adaptive_concurrency=True,
    )

    await downloader.add_urls([
        "https://example.com/file1.zip",
        "https://example.com/file2.zip",
    ], "./downloads")

    await downloader.start()

asyncio.run(main())

docs.title: 批量进度回调
docs.text:
回调系统已全面升级，支持多种调用风格（事件、字典、关键字参数、传统格式），并提供详细的单文件进度信息。

import asyncio
from littledl import BatchDownloader, BatchProgress

# 风格1: 接收 BatchProgress 对象（推荐）
def on_batch_progress(progress: BatchProgress):
    print(f"批量进度: {progress.completed_files}/{progress.total_files}")
    print(f"速度: {progress.smooth_speed/1024/1024:.1f} MB/s")
    print(f"预计剩余: {progress.eta:.0f}s")
    print(f"速度稳定性: {progress.speed_stability:.2f}")
    # 查看正在下载的文件
    for f in progress.get_active_files():
        print(f"  下载中: {f.filename} - {f.progress:.1f}%")

# 风格2: 接收字典
def on_batch_progress_dict(data: dict):
    print(f"批量进度: {data['completed_files']}/{data['total_files']}")
    print(f"速度: {data['smooth_speed']/1024/1024:.1f} MB/s")
    print(f"文件进度: {data['files_progress']:.1f}%")

# 风格3: 接收关键字参数
def on_batch_progress_kwargs(total_files=0, completed_files=0, smooth_speed=0, files_progress=0, **kwargs):
    print(f"批量进度: {completed_files}/{total_files}")
    print(f"文件进度: {files_progress:.1f}%")

# 风格4: 传统格式（自动检测）
def on_batch_progress_legacy(completed: int, total: int, speed: float, eta: int, stability: float):
    print(f"批量进度: {completed}/{total}")

downloader = BatchDownloader()
downloader.set_progress_callback(on_batch_progress)  # 自动识别风格

docs.title: 单文件完成回调
docs.text:
from littledl import FileTask

def on_file_complete(task: FileTask):
    print(f"文件完成: {task.filename} ({task.file_size} bytes)")

downloader = BatchDownloader()
downloader.set_file_complete_callback(on_file_complete)

docs.title: 自适应并发控制
docs.text:
默认启用自适应并发控制，系统会根据下载速度自动调整并发数：

  • 速度持续下降 → 增加并发利用更多带宽
  • 速度稳定上升 → 维持或增加并发
  • 错误率上升 → 自动降低并发
downloader = BatchDownloader(
    enable_adaptive_concurrency=True,
    max_concurrent_files=10,
)

docs.title: 手动并发控制
docs.text:
禁用自适应模式，手动设置固定并发数：

downloader = BatchDownloader(
    enable_adaptive_concurrency=False,
    max_concurrent_files=3,
)

docs.title: 文件优先级
docs.text:
支持手动设置文件下载优先级：

downloader = BatchDownloader()

# 添加文件时可指定优先级（数字越小优先级越高）
await downloader.add_url(url1, priority=0)  # 高优先级
await downloader.add_url(url2, priority=1)  # 普通优先级
await downloader.add_url(url3, priority=2)  # 低优先级

docs.title: 智能分块策略
docs.text:
系统会根据文件大小自动选择最优分块策略：

文件大小 分块策略 说明 < 5 MB 单分块 避免分片开销 5 MB ~ 100 MB 4 分块 平衡并发和开销 > 100 MB 8 分块 最大化吞吐

docs.title: 获取所有任务
docs.text:
downloader = BatchDownloader()
await downloader.add_urls(urls, "./downloads")
await downloader.start()

tasks = downloader.get_all_tasks()
for task in tasks:
    print(f"{task.filename}: {task.status.value} ({task.progress:.1f}%)")

docs.title: 获取统计信息
docs.text:
stats = downloader.get_stats()
print(f"总文件数: {stats['total_files']}")
print(f"已完成: {stats['completed_files']}")
print(f"失败: {stats['failed_files']}")
print(f"当前并发: {stats['current_concurrency']}")
print(f"总进度: {stats['progress_percent']:.1f}%")

docs.title: 获取批量进度
docs.text:
progress = downloader.get_progress()
print(f"总大小: {progress.total_bytes / 1024 / 1024:.1f} MB")
print(f"已下载: {progress.downloaded_bytes / 1024 / 1024:.1f} MB")
print(f"速度: {progress.overall_speed / 1024 / 1024:.1f} MB/s")
print(f"预计剩余: {progress.eta:.0f}s")

docs.title: 暂停、恢复和取消
docs.text:
downloader = BatchDownloader()
await downloader.add_urls(urls, "./downloads")

# 启动下载
task = asyncio.create_task(downloader.start())

# 暂停
await asyncio.sleep(5)
await downloader.pause()

# 恢复
await asyncio.sleep(2)
await downloader.resume()

# 取消
await asyncio.sleep(5)
await downloader.cancel()

# 等待完成
await task

docs.title: BatchDownloader
docs.text:
class BatchDownloader:
    def __init__(
        self,
        config: DownloadConfig | None = None,
        max_concurrent_files: int = 5,
        max_concurrent_chunks_per_file: int = 4,
        enable_adaptive_concurrency: bool = True,
        enable_small_file_priority: bool = True,
    ) -> None:
        ...

    async def add_url(
        self,
        url: str,
        save_path: str | Path = "./downloads",
        filename: str | None = None,
        priority: int = 0,
    ) -> str:
        """添加单个URL到下载队列"""
        ...

    async def add_urls(
        self,
        urls: list[str],
        save_path: str | Path = "./downloads",
    ) -> list[str]:
        """批量添加URL到下载队列"""
        ...

    def set_progress_callback(self, callback) -> None:
        """设置批量进度回调 (completed, total, speed, eta)"""
        ...

    def set_file_complete_callback(self, callback) -> None:
        """设置单文件完成回调 (task: FileTask)"""
        ...

    async def start(self) -> None:
        """启动批量下载"""
        ...

    async def pause(self) -> None:
        """暂停下载"""
        ...

    async def resume(self) -> None:
        """恢复下载"""
        ...

    async def cancel(self) -> None:
        """取消下载"""
        ...

    async def stop(self) -> None:
        """停止下载并关闭连接池"""
        ...

    def get_task(self, task_id: str) -> FileTask | None:
        """根据ID获取任务"""
        ...

    def get_all_tasks(self) -> list[FileTask]:
        """获取所有任务"""
        ...

    def get_progress(self) -> BatchProgress:
        """获取批量下载进度"""
        ...

    def get_stats(self) -> dict:
        """获取统计信息"""
        ...

docs.title: 高速下载模式 (EnhancedBatchDownloader)
docs.text: EnhancedBatchDownloader 是基于aria2风格优化的高性能批量下载器，提供更智能的下载调度。

docs.title: 核心特性
docs.text: 特性 说明 智能风格选择 根据文件大小、服务器支持、网络状况自动选择最优下载风格 动态线程分配 全局线程池统一调度，避免资源浪费 多源备份 支持多个备用URL，故障自动切换 文件复用 内容感知匹配，避免重复下载

docs.title: 风格选择算法
docs.text:
系统会自动分析并选择最佳下载风格：

from littledl import DownloadStyle, StrategySelector

selector = StrategySelector(
    default_style=DownloadStyle.ADAPTIVE,
    enable_single=True,
    enable_multi=True,
)

# 文件分析
profile = selector.analyze_file(
    url="https://example.com/file.zip",
    size=100 * 1024 * 1024,  # 100MB
    supports_range=True,
)

# 风格决策
decision = selector.select_style(profile)
print(f"推荐风格: {decision.style.value}")
print(f"推荐分块: {decision.recommended_chunks}")
print(f"预估加速: {decision.estimated_speedup:.1f}x")

docs.title: 使用示例
docs.text:
import asyncio
from littledl import EnhancedBatchDownloader

async def main():
    downloader = EnhancedBatchDownloader(
        max_concurrent_files=5,
        max_total_threads=15,
        enable_existing_file_reuse=True,
        enable_multi_source=True,
    )

    # 支持备份URL
    await downloader.add_url(
        "https://example.com/file.zip",
        backup_urls=["https://backup.com/file.zip"]
    )

    await downloader.start()

asyncio.run(main())

docs.title: 动态风格分配
docs.text:
多文件下载时，系统会根据全局资源动态分配风格：

from littledl import DynamicStyleAllocator, DownloadStyle

allocator = DynamicStyleAllocator(
    selector=selector,
    max_concurrent_files=5,
    max_total_chunks=16,
)

# 添加文件并获取分配
decision = await allocator.add_file(
    file_id="file1",
    url="https://example.com/file.zip",
    size=100 * 1024 * 1024,
    supports_range=True,
    priority=1,
)
print(f"分配风格: {decision.style.value}")

docs.title: 文件复用统计
docs.text:
reuse_stats = downloader.get_file_reuse_stats()
print(f"检查次数: {reuse_stats['checks']}")
print(f"命中次数: {reuse_stats['hits']}")
print(f"节省流量: {reuse_stats['bytes_saved_formatted']}")

docs.title: API 参考
docs.text:
from littledl import (
    EnhancedBatchDownloader,
    StrategySelector,
    DynamicStyleAllocator,
    DownloadStyle,
)

# 策略选择器
selector = StrategySelector(
    default_style=DownloadStyle.ADAPTIVE,
    enable_single=True,
    enable_multi=True,
    max_chunks=16,
)

# 动态分配器
allocator = DynamicStyleAllocator(
    selector=selector,
    max_concurrent_files=5,
    max_total_chunks=16,
)

# EnhancedBatchDownloader
downloader = EnhancedBatchDownloader(
    config: DownloadConfig | None = None,
    max_concurrent_files: int = 5,
    max_total_threads: int = 15,
    small_file_threshold: int = 1 * 1024 * 1024,
    enable_existing_file_reuse: bool = True,
    enable_multi_source: bool = True,
    enable_adaptive_speed: bool = True,
)

docs.title: 命令行界面
docs.text: littledl 提供功能完整的命令行界面，既支持交互式使用，也支持脚本调用。

docs.title: 安装
docs.text:
安装 littledl 后，CLI 命令 littledl 即可使用：

pip install littledl

验证安装：

littledl --version
# 输出: littledl 0.6.1

docs.title: 下载单个文件
docs.text: littledl "https://example.com/large-file.zip" -o ./downloads

docs.title: 直接下载多个文件
docs.text: littledl "https://example.com/file1.zip" "https://example.com/file2.pdf" "https://example.com/file3.doc" -o ./downloads

docs.title: 批量下载
docs.text:
创建文件 urls.txt，每行一个 URL：

# 支持注释行
https://example.com/file1.zip
https://example.com/file2.pdf
https://example.com/file3.doc

然后执行下载：

littledl -F urls.txt -o ./downloads

docs.title: 常用选项
docs.text: 选项 说明 默认值 -o, --output 路径 输出目录或文件路径 ./downloads -f, --filename 名称 指定输出文件名 服务器提供 -c, --max-chunks N 最大并行分块数 16 -t, --timeout 秒 请求超时时间 300 --proxy URL HTTP 代理 无 --speed-limit 字节/秒 限速 不限速 --retry N 最大重试次数 3 -v, --verbose 详细输出 False --temp-dir 路径 临时文件目录 输出文件同级目录

docs.title: 下载模式
docs.text: 模式 说明 适用场景 single 单线程下载 小文件、不支持 Range 的服务器 multi 多线程分段下载 大文件、稳定连接 adaptive 根据条件自动选择 大多数场景 hybrid_turbo 自适应 + AIMD 拥塞控制 追求极致速度、不稳定网络 auto 由 littledl 分析后决定 推荐给新手用户

docs.title: 示例
docs.text:
# 自动选择最佳模式
littledl "https://example.com/file.zip" -s auto

# 强制单线程
littledl "https://example.com/file.zip" -s single

# 最高性能
littledl "https://example.com/file.zip" -s hybrid_turbo -c 32

docs.title: 交互模式 (TTY)
docs.text:
当标准输出是终端时，littledl 显示动态进度条：

[=============>                ]  45.2% |  45.2MB / 100.0MB | 10.5MB/s | 预计剩余: 00:05

docs.title: 非交互模式 (管道/重定向)
docs.text:
当输出被管道传输或重定向时，littledl 自动切换到最小化输出：

# 输出到文件
littledl "https://example.com/file.zip" > download.log

# 管道到其他工具
littledl "https://example.com/file.zip" | head -c 100

docs.title: 输出格式
docs.text:
使用 --output-format 控制输出样式：

格式 说明 auto 自动检测（默认）- TTY 使用文本，管道使用 JSON text 人类可读的文本输出 json 结构化 JSON，用于脚本调用

docs.title: JSON 输出
docs.text:
程序化调用时，指定 JSON 输出：

littledl "https://example.com/file.zip" -o /tmp --output-format json

JSON 输出示例：

{
  "type": "download",
  "success": true,
  "path": "/tmp/file.zip",
  "size": 104857600
}

批量下载 JSON 输出：

{
  "type": "batch",
  "success": true,
  "total": 10,
  "completed": 9,
  "failed": 1,
  "total_bytes": 104857600,
  "elapsed_seconds": 120.5,
  "average_speed": 870123.45,
  "tasks": [
    {
      "filename": "file1.zip",
      "url": "https://example.com/file1.zip",
      "status": "completed",
      "size": 10485760,
      "downloaded": 10485760,
      "error": null
    }
  ]
}

docs.title: 退出码
docs.text:
littledl 使用特定的退出码，便于脚本处理：

代码 含义 0 成功 1 一般错误 2 URL 错误或参数无效 3 重试后下载失败 4 用户取消 (Ctrl+C)

脚本中的使用示例：

littledl "https://example.com/file.zip" -o /tmp
if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then
    echo "下载成功"
else
    echo "下载失败，退出码 $?"
fi

docs.title: 断点续传
docs.text: littledl "https://example.com/large-file.zip" -o ./downloads --resume

docs.title: 跳过 SSL 验证（不推荐）
docs.text: littledl "https://example.com/file.zip" --no-verify-ssl

docs.title: 使用代理
docs.text: littledl "https://example.com/file.zip" --proxy "http://proxy:8080"

docs.title: 限速下载
docs.text:
# 限制为 1MB/s
littledl "https://example.com/file.zip" --speed-limit 1048576

docs.title: 批量下载并发控制
docs.text: littledl -F urls.txt -o ./downloads --max-concurrent 3

docs.title: 安静模式（最小输出）
docs.text: littledl -F urls.txt --quiet

docs.title: 仅显示文件信息
docs.text:
littledl "https://example.com/file.zip" -i
# 输出：
# 文件信息:
#   文件名: example.zip
#   大小: 104.5 MB
#   Content-Type: application/zip
#   断点续传: 支持

docs.title: 自动分析并选择最佳模式
docs.text: littledl "https://example.com/file.zip" -s auto -i

docs.title: 环境变量
docs.text: 变量 说明 LANG 语言选择（如 zh_CN、en_US）

docs.title: 进阶阅读
docs.text:
• 配置指南 - 所有配置选项详解
  • 批量下载 - 高级批量下载功能
  • API 参考 - 将 littledl 作为库使用

docs.title: 配置指南
docs.text: littledl 的详细配置选项。

docs.title: DownloadConfig
docs.text:
下载操作的主要配置类。

from littledl import DownloadConfig

config = DownloadConfig(
    enable_chunking=True,
    max_chunks=16,
    chunk_size=4 * 1024 * 1024,  # 4MB
    buffer_size=64 * 1024,        # 64KB
    timeout=300,
    resume=True,
    verify_ssl=True,
)

docs.title: 配置选项
docs.text: 选项 类型 默认值 说明 enable_chunking bool True 启用多线程分块下载 max_chunks int 16 最大并发分块数 chunk_size int 4MB 每个分块的大小 buffer_size int 64KB 磁盘写入缓冲区大小 timeout float 300 读写超时时间（秒） resume bool True 启用断点续传 verify_ssl bool True 验证 SSL 证书 fallback_to_single_on_failure bool True 分块失败时自动回退到单连接下载 enable_adaptive bool True 启用自适应网络调度 enable_hybrid_turbo bool True 启用具有 AIMD 拥塞控制和智能重切策略的混合涡轮加速 hybrid_aimd_increase_step int 1 每次增加的并发目标线程数 (加性增) hybrid_aimd_decrease_factor float 0.5 遇到速度骤降时的并发减少系数 (乘性减) hybrid_speedup_threshold float 0.08 触发 AIMD 提速的最小相对网络加速阈值 hybrid_slow_chunk_ratio float 0.45 被视为极慢资源块的耗时占比阈值 verify_hash bool False 校验下载文件哈希 expected_hash str None 预期哈希值 hash_algorithm str sha256 校验使用的哈希算法 min_file_size int None 拒绝小于该值的文件 max_file_size int None 拒绝大于该值的文件 progress_update_interval float 0.5 回调刷新间隔（秒） chunk_callback Callable None 分块下载过程中的分片状态回调

docs.title: 代理配置
docs.text:
from littledl import DownloadConfig, ProxyConfig, ProxyMode

proxy = ProxyConfig(
    mode=ProxyMode.CUSTOM,
    http_proxy="http://proxy.example.com:8080",
    https_proxy="https://proxy.example.com:8080",
)

config = DownloadConfig(proxy=proxy)

docs.title: 速度限制
docs.text:
from littledl import DownloadConfig, SpeedLimitConfig, SpeedLimitMode

speed_limit = SpeedLimitConfig(
    enabled=True,
    mode=SpeedLimitMode.GLOBAL,
    max_speed=1024 * 1024,  # 1 MB/s
)

config = DownloadConfig(speed_limit=speed_limit)

docs.title: 进度回调
docs.text:
progress_callback 支持四种格式：

  • 传统位置参数：(downloaded, total, speed, eta)
  • 事件对象：ProgressEvent
  • 字典载荷：dict
  • 关键字参数：**payload
from littledl import ProgressEvent

def on_progress(downloaded: int, total: int, speed: float, eta: int):
    percent = (downloaded / total) * 100
    print(f"\r{percent:.1f}% | {speed/1024:.1f} KB/s | 剩余: {eta}s", end="")

def on_event(event: ProgressEvent):
    print(event.progress, event.remaining)

def on_dict(payload: dict):
    print(payload["downloaded"], payload["speed"])

def on_kwargs(**payload):
    print(payload["eta"])

config = DownloadConfig(progress_callback=on_progress)

docs.title: 分块状态回调
docs.text:
chunk_callback 仅在分块下载模式下触发，支持与 progress_callback 相同的四种格式。

from littledl import ChunkEvent

def on_chunk(event: ChunkEvent):
    print(event.chunk_index, event.status, event.progress)

config = DownloadConfig(chunk_callback=on_chunk)

docs.title: 错误处理
docs.text: littledl 如何处理错误和异常。

docs.title: DownloadException
docs.text:
所有下载相关错误的基础异常。

from littledl import DownloadException

try:
    path = download_file_sync("https://example.com/file.zip")
except DownloadException as e:
    print(f"下载失败: {e}")

docs.title: NetworkError
docs.text:
网络相关错误（连接超时、DNS 失败等）。

from littledl import NetworkError

try:
    path = download_file_sync("https://example.com/file.zip")
except NetworkError as e:
    print(f"网络错误: {e}")

docs.title: AuthenticationError
docs.text:
认证失败。

from littledl import AuthenticationError

try:
    path = download_file_sync("https://example.com/protected.zip", config=config)
except AuthenticationError as e:
    print(f"认证失败: {e}")

docs.title: FileExistsError
docs.text:
文件已存在且 overwrite 设置为 False。

from littledl import FileExistsError

try:
    path = download_file_sync("https://example.com/file.zip", overwrite=False)
except FileExistsError as e:
    print(f"文件已存在: {e}")

docs.title: 重试配置
docs.text:
为失败的下载配置自动重试。

from littledl import DownloadConfig, RetryConfig, RetryMode

retry = RetryConfig(
    enabled=True,
    mode=RetryMode.EXPONENTIAL,
    max_retries=3,
    initial_delay=1.0,
    max_delay=60.0,
)

config = DownloadConfig(retry=retry)

docs.title: URL 验证
docs.text:
下载前始终验证 URL：

from urllib.parse import urlparse

def validate_url(url: str) -> bool:
    parsed = urlparse(url)
    return parsed.scheme in ('http', 'https')

if not validate_url(url):
    raise ValueError("无效的 URL")

docs.title: 文件大小限制
docs.text:
设置最大文件大小以防止过度下载：

from littledl import DownloadConfig

config = DownloadConfig(
    max_file_size=100 * 1024 * 1024,  # 100MB
)

docs.title: 快速入门
docs.text: 快速入门指南，帮助您快速上手 littledl。

docs.title: 前置要求
docs.text:
• Python 3.10 或更高版本
  • pip 或 uv 包管理器

docs.title: 使用 pip
docs.text: pip install littledl

docs.title: 使用 uv
docs.text: uv add littledl

from littledl import download_file_sync

path = download_file_sync("https://example.com/file.zip")
print(f"下载至: {path}")

docs.title: 异步下载
docs.text:
import asyncio
from littledl import download_file

async def main():
    path = await download_file(
        "https://example.com/file.zip",
        save_path="./downloads",
        filename="my_file.zip",
    )
    print(f"下载至: {path}")

asyncio.run(main())

docs.title: 代理配置
docs.text: littledl 代理配置详细指南。

docs.title: 系统代理（自动检测）
docs.text:
自动检测并使用系统代理设置。

docs.title: 自定义代理
docs.text:
手动指定代理设置。

proxy = ProxyConfig(
    mode=ProxyMode.CUSTOM,
    http_proxy="http://proxy.example.com:8080",
    https_proxy="https://proxy.example.com:8080",

docs.title: 无代理
docs.text:
显式禁用代理。

proxy = ProxyConfig(mode=ProxyMode.NONE)

docs.title: SOCKS5 代理
docs.text:
proxy = ProxyConfig(
    mode=ProxyMode.CUSTOM,
    socks5_proxy="socks5://user:pass@proxy.example.com:1080",
)

docs.title: 在 DownloadConfig 中使用代理
docs.text:
from littledl import DownloadConfig, ProxyConfig, ProxyMode

proxy = ProxyConfig(
    mode=ProxyMode.CUSTOM,
    http_proxy="http://proxy.example.com:8080",
)

config = DownloadConfig(proxy=proxy)
path = download_file_sync("https://example.com/file.zip", config=config)

docs.title: 环境变量
docs.text:
littledl 也支持标准代理环境变量：

  • HTTP_PROXY / http_proxy
  • HTTPS_PROXY / https_proxy
  • SOCKS_PROXY / socks_proxy
  • NO_PROXY / no_proxy
